content-right-description2:
Overview

A multiblock needed for visiting planets via a rocket and most mission, since it allows the writing of mass, distance data and composition onto a galaxy database.

Inputting Data
Inputting data can be done with the three data hatches, each one supplying one data type, from one planet.
The inputted data can be seen in the left slot of the corresponding column.
There can be up to 4000 data in each left column the amount of data in the right slot is decided by the dimension properties.

Transferring to galaxy database
The database will need to be inputted, in the bottom right slot, this will automatically display your current level of data in the right slot in the columns.The data will then be slowly transferred into the database.

This block requires Energy
